# RSS feed URLs for housing news alerts (one per line)
# Auto-populated by configure-alerts-feeds.yml — do not edit manually
# Last updated: by GitHub Actions on $(date -u '+%Y-%m-%d')

# ── Google News: Colorado affordable housing topics ──
https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=colorado+affordable+housing&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en
https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=colorado+zoning+land+use+housing&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en
https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=colorado+housing+policy+legislature&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en
https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=LIHTC+tax+credit+affordable+housing&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en
https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=CHFA+Colorado+housing+finance&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en

# ── NCSHA: National Council of State Housing Agencies ──
https://www.ncsha.org/feed/

# ── Novogradac: LIHTC & affordable housing news ──
https://www.novoco.com/rss.xml

# ── HUD: Exchange news and updates ──
https://www.hudexchange.info/feed/

# ── Colorado General Assembly: legislation tracking ──
https://leg.colorado.gov/rss.xml
